basic_details.job_title: IGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Hospital Delhi (IGH Delhi) has published the Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Senior Resident position. Candidates up to 45 years of age holding an MDS (Orthodontics) qualification are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 15 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are provided below.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IGH Delhi Senior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IGH Delhi Senior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IGH Delhi Senior Resident Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IGH Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IGH Delhi Senior Resident Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IGH Delhi Senior Resident Vacancy Details 2026
IGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IGH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IGH Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Indira Gandhi Hospital Delhi recruitment is Senior Resident.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Senior Resident post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The last date for the walk-in interview is 15-07-2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required qualification for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the Senior Resident post is MDS (Orthodontics).

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held at Indira Gandhi Hospital Delhi, New Delhi - 110077.
